docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $540.00 FILED BY BAUM MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT GUDONIS ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
